caption: A video call is displayed in a grid layout featuring several participants in different indoor settings. The participants include men and women in casual attire, such as t-shirts and button-down shirts, and some are wearing headsets. Visible on-screen names include "Jerry McHugh," "Noureddine Mohamed," "Patrick Martyn," "Brian Logan," "Sean O'Bryan," "Charles Mann," "Seyedn Mehr," and "Jean-Jan van de Vyze." One participant is in a room with a white curtain, another is in a space with a large window showing greenery, and one is seated in what appears to be a vehicle. Some participants are speaking or looking toward their cameras, while others remain still. The frames show a static arrangement of these participants, with minimal changes in their positions or expressions, maintaining the same grid configuration throughout the sequence.
